title: Incident
description: An operational incident handled by AgenticOps incident-response. Produced by agents, gated by human approval before any remediation runs.

severity.description: Sev-1 = customer-facing outage. Sev-5 = informational only.

alarm_source.description: What emitted this incident (CloudWatch alarm name, Prometheus rule, Langfuse signal, etc.).

deployment_ref.description: The Deployment.id affected, if known. Used to reuse the deployment's rollback_plan.

proposed_fix.description: Free-form description of the fix the agent wants to apply. Must be human-reviewable before execution.

runbook_ref.description: Path or URL to the runbook the agent consulted.

evidence.description: Log excerpts, metric snapshots, trace ids supporting the proposal.
